parsed_review.summary: CP00-352 is a clean descriptor-only continuation of the RP11.P05 time-expense fixture binding slice (M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail + M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head, 10 planned units, risk A). The pack-level production_ready claim is FALSE and runtime_ready is FALSE; only a derived production_ready_candidate is set at the Hermes evidence layer, so there is no enterprise-trust or runtime overclaim. Verified end-to-end: (1) plan binding — CP00-352 exists in the live closeout-pack-plan.json with matching risk A / 10 units / range RP11.P05.M05.S18-RP11.P05.M06.S07, deliverable distribution test:1/impl:2/fixture:6/claude_review:1, and micro-title split 3/7, contiguous with CP00-351 upstream and CP00-353 next (RP11.P05.M06.S08); deviation_from_plan:false is accurate. (2) Implementation — registry/service/validators add the CP352 binding, requirements, no-write attestation, row-extras, case-set/descriptor generators, coverage+slice validators, Hermes/Claude packet builders, and CP00-353 handoff, all matching the prior descriptor-only pattern; the inherited row-extras chain supplies the exact fields the validators/tests assert; index.js wildcard re-exports the new surface so its unchanged state is correct. (3) Boundaries — all freeze results and the contract projection assert descriptor-only, no runtime dispatch, no DB/object-storage/audit writes, no Hermes runtime receipt, synthetic-only, no real data, customer-safe errors, and no leaks. (4) Contract — current_pack, cp352_requirements, cp352_no_write_attestation, fixture_binding_slice_descriptor, and the historical_pack_bindings tail all equal the registry/service generators (deep-equal in validate-rp11-time-expense-core-contract.mjs). (5) Authority/hardening — claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; CP178+ forbidden_review_evidence covers auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped, disabled tools, and missing fields; auth preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON; tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob; Hermes H11 used only for deterministic packet/receipt evidence, not product runtime. Command-evidence records node --check/--test, rp05-rp11 validators, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/control-plane/goal/fullplan validate, npm test, npm run validate, build, and git diff --check all at exit 0. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are correctly absent now — they are produced by this very review run and the gated post-review steps before commit, so their absence is expected, not a defect. One P3 metadata nit only. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and is not the final approver; human final approval for the enterprise trust claim is preserved outside this receipt.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies the pack's own evidence dir/handoff doc as unrelated dirty files
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-352/ and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appear in BOTH untracked_implementation_files (lines 130-133) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 137-138). The pack's own evidence directory (cp00-352/) is part of this pack, not an unrelated dirty file. This also diverges from the manifest's worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (manifest.json lines 543-551), which lists only the docx, the ldip invalid-attempt JSON, and the workbook files and correctly omits these two. The discrepancy is in an auto-generated review-support artifact and is benign: the directory is simultaneously listed in untracked_implementation_files, the manifest classifies it correctly, and active_pack_implementation_refs / git_status_rows are accurate, so no pack content, boundary, validation, or production_ready determination is affected.
findings.recommendation: Align the two files: drop docs/closeout-packs/cp00-352/ and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md from unrelated_dirty_files_preserved in changed-file-scope.json (keeping them only in untracked_implementation_files) so the pack's own evidence dir is not labeled 'unrelated'. No code or boundary change required.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking metadata-only nit in an auto-generated review-support artifact; does not affect pack contents, descriptor-only/no-real-data boundaries, validation evidence, authority boundary, or the production_ready=false claim. Safe to address during scope-generation tooling cleanup; does not gate CP00-352 closeout.
